  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the analysis of aerosol droplet size and concentration using a high-resolution aerosol mass spectrometer (HRAMS). The goal is to measure the actual yield of aerosol constituents under different conditions.",

    "Stock concentration: 2% (w/w)"
